_chrome_config_comment: COMMITTED DEFAULTS for the email-chrome config (feedback + unsubscribe links).
None of these are secrets (an ARN and two public URLs, all already committed
repo-wide). They exist because on 2026-07-07 a `cdk deploy` WITHOUT the -c
flags silently reset the live Lambda's env to empty strings -- the first
decoupled production send (2026-07-08) then went out with no feedback link
and BROKEN (relative-URL) subscriber unsubscribe links. CDK CLI context is
not sticky across deploys; committed cdk.json context is. A -c flag still
overrides these; stack.py additionally FAILS LOUD at synth if any resolves
